description: Build the complete Home page with all sections: full viewport hero with massive typography and background video, interactive design showcase, services section with 3D tilt cards, 8-step process section, and premium footer. This is the main landing page that showcases the studio's capabilities with Awwwards-level motion design.
steps: Create components/Home/Hero.tsx: Full viewport (100vh) hero section with: massive editorial typography (company tagline like 'We Design & Build Exceptional Digital Experiences' with character/word reveal animations on load), background video element (use a placeholder video URL, muted autoplay loop, with dark overlay for text contrast), scroll indicator at bottom with bounce animation, parallax depth effect on scroll. Typography should be in the 8vw-12vw range for impact.

Create components/Home/DesignShowcase.tsx: Interactive showcase section demonstrating the studio's craft. Animated code editor visual (syntax-highlighted code block that types out with GSAP timeline), UI component assembly animation (cards/buttons/inputs assembling into a layout on scroll), design system visualization (color swatches, typography samples that animate in). Use ScrollTrigger for scroll-driven animations. This section tells the story of how designs come to life.

Create components/Home/Services.tsx: Services grid/list section with 3D tilt cards for each of the 6 services. Each card has: service name, brief description, icon or visual, 3D tilt effect on mouse move (using transform perspective/rotateX/rotateY), dynamic shadow that follows mouse position, hover scale effect, link to individual service page. Use the services data from lib/constants.ts. Stagger reveal on scroll.

Create components/Home/Process.tsx: Interactive 8-step process section (Discovery, Strategy, Wireframing, UI Design, Development, Testing, Launch, Growth). Each step has a number, title, and brief description. Horizontal scroll or vertical timeline layout with ScrollTrigger-driven progress. Active step highlights as user scrolls. Connector lines between steps animate. Consider a sticky/pinned scroll section where steps reveal sequentially.

Create components/Footer/Footer.tsx: Premium footer with: large CTA text ('Let's build something exceptional' or similar with reveal animation), company information (address, email, phone from constants), quick links, social media placeholders, copyright. Multi-column layout with stagger animations on scroll into view. Back-to-top button with smooth scroll.

Create app/page.tsx: Assemble all Home sections in order - Hero, DesignShowcase, Services, Process, Footer. Initialize ScrollTrigger and any page-level GSAP timelines. Ensure smooth scroll integration works with all sections.
Add proper scroll-triggered animations to each section using ScrollTrigger (elements animate in as they enter viewport)
Verify: npm run build passes with the complete home page
acceptance_criteria: Hero section fills viewport with massive typography and background video placeholder
Design showcase section has animated code editor and UI assembly visuals
Services section displays all 6 services with 3D tilt card interactions
Process section shows all 8 steps with scroll-driven progression
Footer contains company info, CTA, and navigation links
All sections have scroll-triggered entrance animations
Page renders without errors and npm run build passes
Typography uses massive editorial sizes (8vw+ for hero headings)
findings: All 5 home page sections implemented with GSAP animations. Hero has word-by-word reveal, parallax heading, video placeholder with dark overlay. DesignShowcase has animated code editor and UI assembly visuals. Services uses 3D tilt cards with perspective rotateX/rotateY on mouse move. Process uses pinned horizontal scroll with ScrollTrigger scrub. Footer has word reveal CTA, multi-column layout, back-to-top. Build and lint pass cleanly. Total first load JS for home page is 155kB.
